title: Tolls (Micheal Chilufya Sata Toll Plaza) Regulations, 2025

sections.heading: In these Regulations, unless the context otherwise Interpretation
sections.text:
requires—
“Agency” has the meaning to the word in the Act;
“bulk toll discount” means a wholesale price discount
applicable to a road user who purchases tolls in bulk;
“frequent road user” means a Zambian registered vehicle
that uses a toll road for a specified minimum number of
times in a specified period as determined by the Agency;
“local road user” means a road user driving a Zambian
registered vehicle domiciled within a ten kilometre radius
of an inland toll point, excluding a port of entry;
Copies of this Statutory Instrument can be obtained from the Government Printer,
P.O. Box 30136, 10101, Lusaka, Price K8.00 each
116 Statutory Instruments 4th April, 2025
“local road user discount” means a toll levied on a local road
user to a specific facility for a specified period of time;
“toll” has the meaning assigned to the word in the Act;
“toll point” means a point designated forthe collection of
tolls under regulation 3; and
“toll road” has the meaning assigned to the words in the Act.
Designation 3 (1) The Ndola to Kitwe road is designated as a toll road.
of toll road
and toll (2) TheAgency shall operate and maintain the toll road, where
point
the toll is situated in accordance with the Act and these Regulations.
(3) The Michael Chilufya Sata Toll Plaza is designated as a
toll point from where a toll fee shall be collected.
Payment of 4. (1) A driver of a vehicle in the Republic, specified in the
toll First Schedule, shall at the point of passing through the toll point
pay to the Agency a toll set out in the First Schedule.
(2) Despite sub-regulation (1), the Agency shall give a discount
to a frequent road user or a local road user of the toll road as set
out in the Second Schedule.
Bulk 5. A road user who buys tolls in bulk shall buy the tolls at
discount rate the bulk toll discount rate set out in the Second Schedule.
4th April, 2025
